description: Celebrate the Year of the Ox with our festive Chinese New Year email template, perfect for beauty and personal care brands. This vibrant template is ideal for announcing seasonal promotions on cosmetics, making it a surefire way to attract customers during this auspicious season. The design encapsulates the spirit of the Chinese New Year, leveraging the strength and reliability symbolized by the Year of the Ox. To further enhance customer engagement, the template includes a compelling free delivery offer. So, not only will your customers be drawn in by the festive theme, but they will also be enticed by the added incentive of free shipping. This versatile template is the perfect solution for your seasonal marketing needs.
short_description: Celebrate the Year of the Ox with our vibrant Chinese New Year email template for beauty and personal care brands. Ideal for announcing seasonal promotions, it offers compelling free delivery to entice customers. Perfect for your seasonal marketing needs.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.
